beats.n_start: {HERO} reaches the eaves of the {THRESHOLD} as the {TRIAL} {DEADLINE_SIGN} sounds, one day to cross the whole enchanted {SETTING_KIND} and reach the {Z6_NAME} by {DEADLINE} to be named among the {WARDEN}s; four ways lead in, {ROUTE_A_CHAR}, {ROUTE_B_CHAR}, {ROUTE_C_CHAR}, and {ROUTE_D_CHAR}
beats.ap_1: {ROUTE_A_CHAR} winds quiet under the first {HAZARD_MOTIF}s and brings {HERO} to the {Z1_NAME} mouth where all the ways knot together
beats.ap_2: {ROUTE_B_CHAR} is easy footing until it climbs to the same knot of {HAZARD_MOTIF} paths at the {Z1_NAME} mouth
beats.ap_3: {ROUTE_C_CHAR} is wide and old and ends, as every road here ends, at the mouth of the {Z1_NAME}
beats.ap_4: {ROUTE_D_CHAR} lets {HERO} in behind the {HAZARD_MOTIF}s and drops down to the {Z1_NAME} mouth from above
beats.e_maze_hub0: the way pinches shut in {HAZARD_MOTIF} and dark and {HERO} cannot find a path back to the marks, and the {TRIAL} slips away for this season
beats.e_maze_hub1: a wrong footing sends {HERO} down into a hollow with no handhold out, and the {DEADLINE_SIGN}s fade far off while the light goes
beats.x_mazeh_1_1: the wrong way deepens, step 1, {HAZARD_MOTIF} and dark closing as {HERO} presses further from the {WARDEN} marks
beats.x_mazeh_1_2: the wrong way deepens, step 2, {HAZARD_MOTIF} and dark closing as {HERO} presses further from the {WARDEN} marks
beats.e_mazeh_1: the cold and the losing of the trail wear {HERO} down, and there is nothing to do but sit and wait for the searchers next day
beats.h_maze: {HERO} stands where four {HAZARD_MOTIF} paths knot together at the heart of the {Z1_NAME}, the {WARDEN} marks scratched on the trunks pointing every wrong way at once
beats.e_maze_1_0: a wrong footing sends {HERO} down into a hollow with no handhold out, and the {DEADLINE_SIGN}s fade far off while the light goes
beats.x_maze1_2_1: the wrong way deepens, step 1, {HAZARD_MOTIF} and dark closing as {HERO} presses further from the {WARDEN} marks
beats.x_maze1_2_2: the wrong way deepens, step 2, {HAZARD_MOTIF} and dark closing as {HERO} presses further from the {WARDEN} marks
beats.x_maze1_2_3: the wrong way deepens, step 3, {HAZARD_MOTIF} and dark closing as {HERO} presses further from the {WARDEN} marks
beats.e_maze1_2: the {WARDEN} mark {HERO} trusted was a false one cut by some past failure, and it leads only to a dead wall of {HAZARD_MOTIF}
beats.x_maze1_3_1: the wrong way deepens, step 1, {HAZARD_MOTIF} and dark closing as {HERO} presses further from the {WARDEN} marks
beats.x_maze1_3_2: the wrong way deepens, step 2, {HAZARD_MOTIF} and dark closing as {HERO} presses further from the {WARDEN} marks
beats.e_maze1_3: the cold and the losing of the trail wear {HERO} down, and there is nothing to do but sit and wait for the searchers next day
beats.b_maze_1: {HERO} works deeper along the spine of the {Z1_NAME}, weighing the {WARDEN} marks against the failing light and the {Z1_TERRAIN} underfoot as the way narrows
beats.e_maze_2_0: the {WARDEN} mark {HERO} trusted was a false one cut by some past failure, and it leads only to a dead wall of {HAZARD_MOTIF}

beats.rc_maze_0_1: the run climbs over root and stone, promising to cut the corner off the {TRIAL} if {HERO} can keep the line
beats.rc_maze_0_2: shadow pools thick along the excursion and the marks grow few, but {HERO} pushes on hoping the run holds
beats.rc_maze_0_3: the side way twists back toward the spine of the trail, and {HERO} weighs whether to trust it or turn again

beats.e_gate5_66: the way pinches shut in {HAZARD_MOTIF} and dark and {HERO} cannot find a path back to the marks, and the {TRIAL} slips away for this season

beats.rc_gate_0_1: the run climbs over root and stone, promising to cut the corner off the {TRIAL} if {HERO} can keep the line
beats.rc_gate_0_2: shadow pools thick along the excursion and the marks grow few, but {HERO} pushes on hoping the run holds
beats.rc_gate_0_3: the side way twists back toward the spine of the trail, and {HERO} weighs whether to trust it or turn again

beats.rc_gate_2_2: shadow pools thick along the excursion and the marks grow few, but {HERO} pushes on hoping the run holds
beats.rc_gate_2_3: the side way twists back toward the spine of the trail, and {HERO} weighs whether to trust it or turn again
beats.f_dusk: {HERO} spills out of the trees before the {Z6_NAME} as the last {DEADLINE_SIGN} dies, the {WARDEN} bar still drawn, three {WARDEN}s standing in the gateway to judge how the whole {TRIAL} was run
beats.f_name: the head {WARDEN} asks {HERO} to account for the day, every mark read and creature met and test faced, and to name the one thing that carried {HERO} the whole way through the {THRESHOLD}
beats.f_wild: the {WARDEN}s will not open the great bar for a latecomer, but one {WARDEN} studies {HERO} and offers the {ALT_PATH}, a harder crossing that earns a lesser but real place if it is walked well
beats.e_win_warden: the head {WARDEN} lays the green cord across {HERO} shoulders and names {HERO} a {WARDEN} of the {THRESHOLD}, the whole test passed and the {Z6_NAME} thrown open on the lit hall beyond
beats.e_win_wild: the {WARDEN}s judge that mercy to the {Z3_SHORT} beasts is the truest {WARDEN} heart of all, and {HERO} is named a {WARDEN} of the {ALT_PATH} with honour
beats.e_win_honest: the {WARDEN}s laugh, not unkindly, at so plain an answer, and name {HERO} a {WARDEN} all the same, for honesty is the first mark they look for
beats.e_win_alt: {HERO} walks the {ALT_PATH} through the dark and comes out at dawn footsore but standing, given a real place among the outer {WARDEN}s, a hard crossing well won
beats.e_gate_slip: the {Z6_SHORT} {WARDEN}s see {HERO} the moment the shadow moves, and a {TRIAL} ended by sneaking is no pass at all, only a quiet walk back out
beats.e_gate_late: the last {DEADLINE_SIGN} dies while {HERO} sits spent in the grass, the bar stays drawn, and the {TRIAL} is lost to be attempted again when the season turns
beats.e_gate_next: {HERO} will not take a lesser crossing on tired legs, and turns for home to try the whole {TRIAL} again next season with more read in the marks

titles.e_win_honest: Named for a Plain True Answer

f_wild.c_f_wild_1: Walk the {ALT_PATH} and earn the lesser place.
